spirit:component.spirit:name: gtyp_ddr4_pl_0_0_phy
spirit:component.spirit:description: Versal Soft DDR4 Memory Controller PHY

spirit:parameter.spirit:name: DDR4_PORT_LOC
DDR4_PIN_PLACEMENT_ARGS
spirit:parameter.spirit:value: DDR4_DATAWIDTH 8 DDR4_READ_DBI false DDR4_BG_WIDTH 2 DDR4_BA_WIDTH 2 DDR4_STACKHEIGHT 1 DDR4_COMPONENT_WIDTH x8 DDR4_MEMORY_DEVICETYPE Components DDR4_RANK 1 DDR4_SLOT Single DDR4_TCK 682 DDR4_TCK_OP 750 DDR4_INPUTCLK_PERIOD 9889 DDR4_INPUTCLK_PERIOD_IP 2500 DDR4_SYSTEM_CLOCK Differential DDR4_CASLATENCY 22 DDR4_CASWRITELATENCY 16 DDR4_AXI_SELECTION true DDR4_AxiDataWidth 64 DDR4_AxiArbitrationScheme RD_PRI_REG DDR4_AxiIDWidth 1 DDR4_AxiAddressWidth 30 DDR4_AxiNarrowBurst true DDR4_MEM_ADDRESS_M AP ROW_COLUMN_BANK DDR4_MIN_PERIOD 625 DDR4_MAX_PERIOD 1600 DDR4_PARITY_EN false DDR4_WRITE_DM_DBI DM_NO_DBI DDR4_READ_DBI false DDR4_LR_WIDTH 1 DDR4_CS_WIDTH 1 DDR4_DQS_WIDTH 1 DDR4_DM_WIDTH 1 DDR4_ADDR_WIDTH 17 DDR4_CKE_WIDTH 1 DDR4_CK_WIDTH 1 DDR4_ODT_WIDTH 1 IS_EXDES false

xilinx:coreExtensions.xilinx:displayName: Versal Soft DDR4 Memory Controller PHY
